name: tooltip-demo
visual_summary: The tooltip-demo is a visual representation of how to use a tooltip in your application. It consists of a trigger element that displays a tooltip on hover or click, providing additional information to the user. Developers can use this demo to test and customize tooltip behavior.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: tooltip-demo
Description: The tooltip-demo is a visual representation of how to use a tooltip in your application. It consists of a trigger element that displays a tooltip on hover or click, providing additional information to the user. Developers can use this demo to test and customize tooltip behavior.
Style: e.g. light, minimal
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: tooltip, hover, popup, info

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
